ddls:
CREATE TABLE "advertising_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the advertising data */,
  "tv_sponsorships" TEXT /* Expenditure on TV sponsorships */,
  "tv_cricket" TEXT /* Expenditure on TV cricket advertising */,
  "tv_RON" TEXT /* Expenditure on TV RON (Run of Network) */,
  "radio" TEXT /* Expenditure on radio advertising */,
  "NPP" TEXT /* Expenditure on NPP (New Product Promotion) */,
  "magazines" TEXT /* Expenditure on magazine advertising */,
  "OOH" TEXT /* Expenditure on out-of-home (OOH) advertising */,
  "social" TEXT /* Expenditure on social media advertising */,
  "programmatic" TEXT /* Expenditure on programmatic advertising */,
  "display_rest" TEXT /* Expenditure on display advertising */,
  "search" TEXT /* Expenditure on search advertising */,
  "native" TEXT /* Expenditure on native advertising */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Total sales attributed to advertising */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region for the advertising data */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Product category for the advertising data */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the media channel (e.g., TV, Radio, Online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media channel */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media channel (e.g., Traditional, Digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "ad_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media allocation */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the allocation */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media channel allocated for the campaign */,
  "allocation_amount" TEXT /* Allocated amount for the media channel in the campaign */,
  "allocation_percentage" TEXT /* Allocated percentage for the media channel in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_allocations_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_allocations_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Total impressions generated by the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Total clicks received by the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Total conversions attributed to the campaign */,
  "CTR" TEXT /* Click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "CPC" TEXT /* Cost per click (CPC) */,
  "CPA" TEXT /* Cost per acquisition (CPA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Client) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user role (e.g., view reports, edit campaigns) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user to log in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., login, view report) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., campaign, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the budget */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the year */,
  "remaining_budget" TEXT /* Remaining budget available for the year */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., campaign report, budget report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the recommendation was made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the recommendation is made */,
  "recommended_budget" TEXT /* Recommended budget for the year */,
  "recommended_channels" TEXT /* Recommended media channels for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
